title: convolvulus naniflorus
intro: Convolvulus naniflorus, also known as dwarf morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Convolvulus naniflorus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Convolvulus naniflorus can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a topical application by crushing the leaves and applying them directly to the affected area.
